app.title: Your Life in Numbers - Birthday Statistics Calculator
app.subtitle: Enter your birthday to discover your life in fascinating numbers

result.title: Your Life So Far
result.disclaimer: These are approximate estimates based on averages. Just for fun!

engage.result1: 2.5 Billion Heartbeats -- Your Heart Never Stops
engage.result4: Millions of Steps -- Your Journey So Far

about.text1: Life in Numbers takes your birthday and calculates fascinating statistics about your life so far. From heartbeats to breaths, steps to dreams, blinks to meals, every number tells a story about the incredible journey of being alive.
about.text2: All numbers are approximate estimates based on scientific averages. They represent the remarkable scale of everyday bodily functions and life events that we rarely think about. This calculator is for entertainment and appreciation of life.
